title: Running containers dekhna
use_case: Currently running Docker containers dekhne ke liye use hota hai.
output_explanation: -a use karne se stopped containers bhi show hote hain.

title: Container logs live dekhna
use_case: Application container ke live logs debug karne ke liye.
output_explanation: -f live follow mode enable karta hai.
warning: High traffic app me logs bahut fast aa sakte hain.
